samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>A simplified radix-2 divider for 8-bit signed or unsigned integers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">The clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">Indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">The dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">The divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">A 1-bit signal indicating that a valid operation request is present.</input>
        <output id="res_ready">A 1-bit signal indicating that the 16-bit output result has already been acknowledged.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">The 16-bit output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
        <output id="res_valid">A 1-bit output signal indicating the result is valid and ready.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state id="DIVIDE">Divide state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter for tracking the number of iterations.</reg>
        <reg id="start_cnt">Flag to indicate the start of the division process.</reg>
        <reg id="res_valid_reg">Register to hold the result validity status.</reg>
        <reg id="res_ready_reg">Register to hold the result readiness status.</reg>
        <reg id="neg_divisor" width_description="[8:0]">Negative divisor for subtraction.</reg>
        <reg id="remainder" width_description="[8:0]">Remainder during division.</reg>
        <reg id="quotient" width_description="[8:0]">Quotient during division.</reg>
        <reg id="SR" width_description="[16:0]">Shift register for storing the dividend.</reg>
        <always @(posedge clk or posedge rst)>
            if (rst) begin
                cnt <= 4'd0;
                start_cnt <= 1'b0;
                res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
                res_ready_reg <= 1'b0;
                neg_divisor <= 9'd0;
                remainder <= 9'd0;
                quotient <= 9'd0;
                SR <= 17'd0;
            end else begin
                case ({res_valid_reg, res_ready_reg})
                    2'b00: begin
                        if (opn_valid && !res_valid_reg) begin
                            cnt <= 4'd1;
                            start_cnt <= 1'b1;
                            res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
                            res_ready_reg <= 1'b0;
                            neg_divisor <= {~|divisor[7], ~divisor} + 1;
                            remainder <= {1'b0, dividend};
                            quotient <= 9'd0;
                            SR <= {1'b0, dividend, 1'b0};
                        end
                    end
                    2'b01: begin
                        if (cnt == 4'd8) begin
                            cnt <= 4'd0;
                            start_cnt <= 1'b0;
                            res_valid_reg <= 1'b1;
                            res_ready_reg <= 1'b0;
                            SR <= {remainder, quotient[7]};
                        end else begin
                            cnt <= cnt + 1;
                            start_cnt <= 1'b1;
                            res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
                            res_ready_reg <= 1'b0;
                            neg_divisor <= {~|divisor[7], ~divisor} + 1;
                            remainder <= {1'b0, SR[16:9]} - neg_divisor;
                            quotient <= {quotient[6:0], ~remainder[8]};
                            SR <= {remainder[7:0], SR[8:1]};
                        end
                    end
                    default: begin
                        cnt <= 4'd0;
                        start_cnt <= 1'b0;
                        res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
                        res_ready_reg <= 1'b0;
                        neg_divisor <= 9'd0;
                        remainder <= 9'd0;
                        quotient <= 9'd0;
                        SR <= 17'd0;
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Division operation starts when opn_valid is high and res_valid is low
        if (opn_valid && !res_valid) begin
            // Save the inputs
            dividend = dividend;
            divisor = divisor;
            
            // Initialize variables
            cnt = 4'd1;
            start_cnt = 1'b1;
            res_valid = 1'b0;
            res_ready = 1'b0;
            neg_divisor = {~|divisor[7], ~divisor} + 1;
            remainder = {1'b0, dividend};
            quotient = 9'd0;
            SR = {1'b0, dividend, 1'b0};
        end
        
        // Perform division operation
        if (start_cnt) begin
            // Check if the counter has reached the maximum value
            if (cnt[3]) begin
                // Reset the counter and stop counting
                cnt = 4'd0;
                start_cnt = 1'b0;
                
                // Update the result
                result = {remainder[7:0], quotient[7:0]};
            end else begin
                // Increment the counter
                cnt = cnt + 1;
                start_cnt = 1'b1;
                
                // Perform subtraction
                remainder = {1'b0, SR[16:9]} - neg_divisor;
                
                // Use mux to select between remainder and neg_divisor
                if (remainder[8])
                    quotient[cnt] = 1'b0;
                else
                    quotient[cnt] = 1'b1;
                    
                // Shift the remainder and quotient
                SR = {remainder[7:0], SR[8:1]};
            end
        end
        
        // Manage result validity
        if (rst) begin
            res_valid = 1'b0;
        end else if (cnt == 4'd8) begin
            res_ready = 1'b1;
        end else if (res_valid & res_ready) begin
            res_valid = 1'b0;
        end else begin
            res_valid = res_valid;
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
